尋找黑警性暴力證人/受害者，協助國際遊說
https://m.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=2640629789347426&id=124616407615456

Post：https://lih.kg/eDEkrT

//平等機會婦女聯席發言人區美寶稱，3個組織11月初共同發起控訴警察性暴力的國際聯署，截至本月7日收集到21國共85個團體聯署支持。為了向聯合國專家展開更有力游說，3個組織呼籲受害者主動聯絡他們並接受訪談，強調會保密。//

我們現正收集抗爭者在抗爭期間／被捕後遭受警察性暴力對待的資料，作以下用途：
1. 協助受害人可以完整保留該事件之紀錄
2. 整理資料並製成 #ProtestToo 實錄，以作追究之用
3. 收集國際聯署（進行中），結合個案提交聯合國，爭取國際間關注及支持
4. 要求香港政府獨立、公正地徹查「反送中運動」發生的性暴力

*個人資料及通訊紀錄在實錄完成後可按受訪者意願全部銷毀
詳情及相關安排請聯絡Tg @protesttoo

My friend Ed works as an accounting manager at Hilton but if he takes the job in Big 4 he'll be three thousand dollars a month better off but he's still better off now than he was two years ago when he was working below everybody else in the department. He thinks a junior accountant position is beneath him. If he hadn't taken the CPA exam two years ago he wouldn't be working as a manager now. If he had pursued a career in sales instead his salary would be much lower. If it hadn't been for his uncle's referral his career wouldn't take off now and he wouldn't start earning a lot of money. He has been having a crush on this girl named Jo for eight years but Jo has a boyfriend. His friend said "i don't blame you. She's quite attractive." But he's beginning to realise he has no place in her scheme if things. He's just being a doormat so I told him to forget her. She's just not worth it. His dad said "Youll be better off without her" His uncle too said "you would be better off without her" His sister recently married her childhood sweetheart. Her mother felt she was marrying beneath her though. Her uncle too feels her husband is beneath her. She enjoys socializing with the better off. Ed is a science fiction fan. He said "if starships really would exist I would quit my job and spend the rest of my life taking the universe" Last month Ed was away on a business trip to Hokkaido. After his trip I said "if you should travel there again can you get me a pack of white lover cookies please?" He's a computer expert. His cousin has to write a report which is due on Tuesday but he's having problems with his computer. If he will go and fix his computer he'll be do thankful for his help. His cousin also has exams next Monday so he's better off revising at home over the weekend. Ed is a kickboxing fan. His favourite fighter Dan has recently won his retirement fight. He's eternally grateful to his coaches and thankful that he has got a job as a colour commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans wanna see randy versus Fred. If Fred would sign a contract with the kickboxing organisation Dana will make the fight happen. After Randy read the terms and conditions of the contract Dana's assistant said "if you would just sign here please" Ed's brother is a concierge in a hotel. I said "if it'll make you happy I'll come to stat for a night as company for you while your colleagues are away" Last week Ed gave a party. As some of us wanna watch the news I asked "if I could turn the television on please" He said "sure. If you would switch to the news channel" By the end of the next century scientists will have invented starships. As I'm fascinated by the science of starships I'm going to ask physicist professor Chow about it. I'm gonna.wait outside the lecture room at twenty five to six. He'll have finished his lecture then. I thought about phoning him at ten past two but my friend said "don't phone him yet. He won't have finished his lecture yet." It's true that he wouldn't have finished teaching yet. I saw joey live twice with my friends which was marvelous and unforgettable. The first time I saw her concert we were late. I remember I said "look at the time. The concert will have begun" It was twenty to eight. The concert would've started by then. It was a worthwhile concert that was compelling enough to see again.
